content.text:
<user_query>
For local development, we need to bypass the login screen, so the root of the app should go directly to the main page, and we should be hardcoding the user ID to 3.
</user_query>

Exploring routing and auth so we can bypass login in local development and hardcode user ID 3.

[REDACTED]

Implementing automatic auth bypass in Vite dev (`import.meta.env.DEV`) and defaulting the dev user ID to 3. Infrastructure already exists; we'll wire defaults so local `pnpm dev` works without extra env vars.

[REDACTED]

input.old_string:
# Optional local dev: skip OAuth and call the real org API with a fixed user + token
# (your backend may ignore the bearer until auth is wired).
# VITE_ORG_NEXT_BYPASS_AUTH=true
# VITE_ORG_NEXT_DEV_USER_ID=3
# VITE_ORG_NEXT_DEV_ACCESS_TOKEN=your-dev-token
input.new_string:
# Local `pnpm dev` skips OAuth by default and uses user id 3 for bootstrap.
# Optional overrides:
# VITE_ORG_NEXT_BYPASS_AUTH=false   # test real login in dev
# VITE_ORG_NEXT_DEV_USER_ID=5
# VITE_ORG_NEXT_DEV_ACCESS_TOKEN=your-dev-token

input.command: cd /Users/duhl/git/ui && mise exec -- pnpm exec turbo typecheck --filter=org-next 2>&1
input.description: Run TypeScript check for org-next package
Run typecheck with mise shims on PATH
